items.title: ONL Therapeutics Appoints Penny Fleck as Chief Development Officer
items.author: N/A
items.description: ONL Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, has appointed Penny Fleck as its new Chief Development Officer. Fleck has over 20 years of experience leading R&D strategies at major pharmaceutical companies and will be responsible for advancing the company's lead asset, ONL1204 Ophthalmic Solution, towards a planned Phase 2 clinical study in geographic atrophy associated with age-related macular degeneration.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions that Johnson & Johnson Innovation – JJDC, Inc. led ONL Therapeutics' recent $65 million Series D financing round, indicating the company's confidence in ONL Therapeutics' potential.
